name: Saffron
summary: Internal cross-linking supports Saffron through compounds such as picrocrocin, crocin, safranal.
description: Internal cross-linking supports Saffron through compounds such as picrocrocin, crocin, safranal.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: Use caution with serotonergic medications and anticoagulants.
interactions: Use caution with serotonergic medications and anticoagulants.
